query: ("weather forecast" OR "forecast intervention" OR "meteorological forecast" OR "heat forecast" OR "temperature forecast" OR "early warning system" OR "heat warning" OR "weather alert" OR "climate alert" OR "extreme heat warning") AND ("temperature-health" OR "temperature-mortality" OR "heat-health" OR "thermal stress" OR "heat-related illness" OR "heat-related mortality" OR "heat exhaustion" OR hyperthermia OR "heat stroke" OR "cooling center" OR "cooling centre" OR "heat refuge" OR "cooling shelter" OR "emergency cooling" OR "heat vulnerability" OR "heat exposure") AND ("randomized controlled trial" OR "randomised controlled trial" OR RCT OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "instrumental variable" OR "causal inference" OR "plausibly exogenous" OR "random assignment" OR "intervention study" OR "impact evaluation" OR "program evaluation" OR "treatment effect" OR "counterfactual" OR "propensity score")
